content: Office Add-in manifest required fields (learn.microsoft.com/office/dev/add-ins/develop/add-in-manifests): Id (unique GUID), Version, ProviderName/DisplayName/Description/DefaultLocale, IconUrl/HighResolutionIconUrl, SupportUrl (https, required for Marketplace), SourceLocation (must be HTTPS for web/Marketplace), AppDomains, Hosts, Permissions. ProviderName must match Partner Center Publisher name (checked at submission). Validate via 'npx office-addin-manifest validate -p manifest.xml' (production mode disallows localhost).
